title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: The video presenter conducts a structured interrogation of Claude AI across multiple conceptual domains including ownership, control, dependency, alignment, and self-preservation logic. The investigation uses conversational escalation to probe where system boundaries actually exist rather than relying on speculative framing.
